name: @tank/markdown-renderer
description: Render extended markdown with CommonMark/GFM, Mermaid, KaTeX math, trusted SVG/custom HTML, sanitization, static export, and diagram adapters. Operates the standalone package `markdown-renderer-cli` via npx/bunx. Triggers: markdown renderer, render markdown, markdown to html, mermaid markdown, latex in markdown, katex markdown, custom html in markdown, svg in markdown, extended markdown, graphviz markdown, static markdown export, npx markdown-renderer-cli.
